entries.description: Array of calendar entries to display

plugins.description: Array of view/feature plugins. When omitted, all built-in views are registered. Pass specific plugins to tree-shake unused views.

headerToolbarViews.description: Restrict which view modes appear in the toolbar dropdown. Array of view name strings (e.g. [\"timeGridWeek\", \"dayGridMonth\"]). When omitted, all registered views are shown.

slotDuration.description: Time grid slot interval in minutes

creatable.description: Enable entry creation via drag (time grid) or double-click (month/day grid). Fires onEntryCreate callback.

slotHeight.description: Height in pixels of each time slot in time grid views. Lower values make the grid more compact.

onEntryCreate.description: Called when a new entry is created via drag or double-click. Receives { start, end, allDay, view }.

eventMinDuration.description: Minimum entry duration in minutes when creating/resizing (0 = no limit).

eventMaxDuration.description: Maximum entry duration in minutes when creating/resizing (0 = no limit).

eventDefaultDuration.description: Default duration in minutes for entries created via click (not drag).

eventDurationEditable.description: Whether entries can be resized. Separate from editable (move).

eventStartEditable.description: Whether entries can be moved. Separate from editable (resize).

eventOverlap.description: Whether dragged/resized entries can overlap existing entries.

eventClassNames.description: Dynamic CSS class names per entry for conditional styling.

eventConstraint.description: Restrict event drag/resize to specific time ranges (e.g., only within business hours).

eventDataTransform.description: Transform function applied to all entry data before rendering.

entryOrder.description: Custom sort function for ordering overlapping entries.

selectMinDistance.description: Min drag distance in pixels before selection starts.

selectOverlap.description: Whether selections can overlap existing entries.

selectAllow.description: Conditionally prevent selection of certain time ranges.

selectMirror.description: Show a mirror entry during drag-to-create instead of selection highlight.

eventAllow.description: Conditionally prevent entry drop/resize at certain times.

scrollTime.description: Initial scroll position for time grid views (HH:MM format).

longPressDelay.description: Milliseconds to hold before touch becomes drag on mobile.

moreLinkClick.description: Behavior when +N more is clicked in month view.

weekNumberClick.description: Callback when a week number is clicked.

dayHeaderClick.description: Callback when a day column header is clicked in time grid.

dateAlignment.description: Navigate by N days instead of view-width (0 = use view default).

allDaySlotMaxHeight.description: Max height in px for the all-day row (0 = unlimited).

dayMinWidth.description: Min column width in px for day columns in time grid (0 = auto).

dayMinHeight.description: Min height in px for day cells in month view (0 = auto).

slotLabelInterval.description: Show time labels every N slots (0 = every slot). E.g., set to 2 with 15-min slots to label every 30 min.

loading.description: Show a loading indicator overlay on the calendar.

stickyHeaderDates.description: Keep day/date headers sticky when scrolling the time grid.

fixedWeekCount.description: Always show 6 weeks in month grid.

expandRows.description: Expand month grid rows to fill available space.

multiMonthCount.description: Number of months to display in multi-month view.

nowIndicatorInterval.description: Update frequency in ms for the now indicator line.

dayPopoverFormat.description: Date format in overflow popover header.

allDayText.description: Label text for the all-day row in time grid and overflow popover.

displayEventTime.description: Whether to show the start time on entries in the default entry renderer.

rowBanding.description: Alternate row colors on time grid

showNavigationPicker.description: Show a DateRangePicker in the toolbar for quick date navigation. Auto-selects week/month/day mode based on current view.

navigationPickerIconOnly.description: When true, shows only a calendar icon for the navigation picker (title remains visible). When false (default), the picker replaces the title with header-styled text.

renderToolbarEnd.description: Custom render for the toolbar end section. Receives { viewSwitcher, pluginActions } as ReactNodes to compose alongside custom components.

dateBackgrounds.description: Highlight specific dates with background colors. Array of {date, color}.

dateRangeBackgrounds.description: Highlight date ranges with background colors. Array of {start, end, color}.

loadingRanges.description: Show shimmer loaders for dates being loaded. Array of {start, end}.

titleFormat.description: Custom date-fns format string for the toolbar title.

dayHeaderFormat.description: Format for day numbers in headers.

weekDayHeaderFormat.description: Format for weekday names in headers.

onExternalDrop.description: Called when an external item is dropped onto the calendar.
